visual_description: A medium shot shows two men in a warmly lit indoor space. The man on the left, with dark hair and wearing a pink and white plaid shirt, looks concerned as he speaks. The man on the right, with lighter hair and wearing a blue and black plaid shirt over a white t-shirt, is seen from the side, listening intently. In the background, a framed picture hangs on the wall, and a lamp is visible to the left. The camera angle shifts, focusing on the man in the blue plaid shirt. He now faces the other man, his expression one of shock and disbelief, with his mouth open. The back of the man in the pink shirt is in the foreground. The background shows a wooden door with the number "1232" on it. A man speaks with a high-pitched, frantic, and panicked voice, his words tumbling out quickly in a state of alarm. "So what? What? They're gone? Monica's gonna freak!" The shot returns to the original angle, showing both men again. The man in the pink shirt continues to speak with a worried look, while the man in the blue shirt listens. The background remains the same, with the framed picture and lamp visible. Another man replies
